input.code:
# Load DESeq2 and dependencies
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names = 1)
metadata_df <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names = 1)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requires integers)
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_df)
storage.mode(counts_matrix) <- 'integer'

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_matrix), "genes ×", ncol(counts_matrix), "cells"))
print("Metadata:")
print(table(metadata_df$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_matrix,
                              colData = metadata_df,
                              design = ~ cell_type)

print(paste("DESeqDataSet created:", nrow(dds), "genes ×", ncol(dds), "samples"))
print("Design formula: ~ cell_type")
